publishedAbstract: - Red Hat Quay image registry is failing to push images to registry.- noobaa backingstore throwing **NO_CAPACITY** error- noobaa backingstore is in **REJECTED** phase **Related Articles:** [How to Scale Up (Expand PVC) a NooBaa PV-Pool Backingstore OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7115464) [Configure Lifecycle Policies on Noobaa/RGW buckets](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7114687) [Defining retention for logs in LokiStack on RHOCP 4](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7053212)
publishedTitle: How to Scale Out (Add More Pods/PVC Volumes) to a NooBaa PV-Pool Backingstore OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
